action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed epoch 1 with mIoU=0.3970, saved at checkpoints/train/best/. Previous eval with pretrained model gave mIoU=0.0007 (random decode head). Analysis: The trained model should give ~0.40 mIoU. Need to submit eval to get official score, then continue training for more epochs to improve. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, write resume training script for next iteration.
